member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ClaimsTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant from a JWT claim. Default claim type: tid (tenant ID). Requires the request to be authenticated.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ClaimsTenantResolver.#ctor(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore,System.String)
member.param: The tenant store to look up the resolved ID.
The claim type that carries the tenant ID. Defaults to tid.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.HeaderTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant from a configurable HTTP request header. Default header: X-Tenant-Id.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.HeaderTenantResolver.#ctor(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore,System.String)
member.param: The tenant store to look up the resolved ID against.
The HTTP header name to read. Defaults to X-Tenant-Id.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.HostTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant from the request's host/subdomain. Example: acme.app.com resolves tenant ID acme.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.HostTenantResolver.#ctor(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore,System.String)
member.param: The tenant store to look up tenants.
Optional. The base domain to strip (e.g., "app.com"). If provided, "acme.app.com" → "acme". If null, uses the first label of the host as tenant ID.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.PathTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant from the URL path prefix. Example: /acme/products resolves tenant ID acme and rewrites path to /products.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ResolverExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for registering resolver strategies.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ResolverExtensions.WithHeaderResolver(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a that reads tenant ID from an HTTP header.
member.param: The header to read. Defaults to X-Tenant-Id.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ResolverExtensions.WithHostResolver(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a that resolves tenant from the request subdomain.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ResolverExtensions.WithClaimsResolver(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a that resolves tenant from a JWT claim.
member.param: The claim type that carries the tenant ID. Defaults to tid.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.Resolvers.ResolverExtensions.WithPathResolver(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder)
member.summary: Adds a that resolves tenant from the URL prefix.
